summary: Field Monitor Phase 2 spoke deployment: implement/deploy Fetcher, Parser Registry, and Proxy Router Cloudflare Workers per Doc2 contracts; run contract tests for strict response-shape validation.

payload.phase_label: Spoke Deployment — Fetcher + Parser Registry + Proxy Router
payload.parallelization_note: Fetcher, Parser Registry, Proxy Router may deploy in parallel
constraints: Do not expand scope beyond three spoke workers
Proxy Router does NOT write to Neon — read only
Service Bindings not wired in this phase
Parser function stored in KV as serialized fn_body string
